members.name: FindBone
members.summary: Returns the bone index that matches [param bone_name] as its name.

members.name: GetBoneName
members.summary: Returns the name of the bone at [param bone_idx] that will be the key name in the [BoneMap]. In the retargeting process, the returned bone name is the bone name of the target skeleton.

members.name: GetBoneParent
members.summary: Returns the name of the bone which is the parent to the bone at [param bone_idx]. The result is empty if the bone has no parent.

members.name: GetBoneTail
members.summary: Returns the name of the bone which is the tail of the bone at [param bone_idx].

members.name: GetGroup
members.summary: Returns the group of the bone at [param bone_idx].

members.name: GetGroupName
members.summary: Returns the name of the group at [param group_idx] that will be the drawing group in the [BoneMap] editor.

members.name: GetHandleOffset
members.summary: Returns the offset of the bone at [param bone_idx] that will be the button position in the [BoneMap] editor. This is the offset with origin at the top left corner of the square.

members.name: GetReferencePose
members.summary: Returns the reference pose transform for bone [param bone_idx].

members.name: GetTailDirection
members.summary: Returns the tail direction of the bone at [param bone_idx].

members.name: GetTexture
members.summary: Returns the texture of the group at [param group_idx] that will be the drawing group background image in the [BoneMap] editor.

members.name: IsRequired
members.summary: Returns whether the bone at [param bone_idx] is required for retargeting. This value is used by the bone map editor. If this method returns [code]true[/code], and no bone is assigned, the handle color will be red on the bone map editor.

members.name: SetBoneName
members.signature: public void SetBoneName(int boneIdx, StringName boneName)
members.summary: Sets the name of the bone at [param bone_idx] that will be the key name in the [BoneMap]. In the retargeting process, the setting bone name is the bone name of the target skeleton.

members.name: SetBoneParent
members.signature: public void SetBoneParent(int boneIdx, StringName boneParent)
members.summary: Sets the bone with name [param bone_parent] as the parent of the bone at [param bone_idx]. If an empty string is passed, then the bone has no parent.

members.name: SetBoneTail
members.signature: public void SetBoneTail(int boneIdx, StringName boneTail)
members.summary: Sets the bone with name [param bone_tail] as the tail of the bone at [param bone_idx].

members.name: SetGroup
members.signature: public void SetGroup(int boneIdx, StringName group)
members.summary: Sets the group of the bone at [param bone_idx].

members.name: SetGroupName
members.signature: public void SetGroupName(int groupIdx, StringName groupName)
members.summary: Sets the name of the group at [param group_idx] that will be the drawing group in the [BoneMap] editor.

members.name: SetHandleOffset
members.signature: public void SetHandleOffset(int boneIdx, Vector2 handleOffset)
members.summary: Sets the offset of the bone at [param bone_idx] that will be the button position in the [BoneMap] editor. This is the offset with origin at the top left corner of the square.

members.name: SetReferencePose
members.signature: public void SetReferencePose(int boneIdx, Transform3D boneName)
members.summary: Sets the reference pose transform for bone [param bone_idx].

members.name: SetRequired
members.signature: public void SetRequired(int boneIdx, bool required)
members.summary: Sets the required status for bone [param bone_idx] to [param required].

members.name: SetTailDirection
members.signature: public void SetTailDirection(int boneIdx, int tailDirection)
members.summary: Sets the tail direction of the bone at [param bone_idx]. [b]Note:[/b] This only specifies the method of calculation. The actual coordinates required should be stored in an external skeleton, so the calculation itself needs to be done externally.

members.name: SetTexture
members.signature: public void SetTexture(int groupIdx, Texture2D texture)
members.summary: Sets the texture of the group at [param group_idx] that will be the drawing group background image in the [BoneMap] editor.

members.name: BoneSize
members.summary: The amount of bones in retargeting section's [BoneMap] editor. For example, [SkeletonProfileHumanoid] has 56 bones. The size of elements in [BoneMap] updates when changing this property in it's assigned [SkeletonProfile].

members.name: GroupSize
members.summary: The amount of groups of bones in retargeting section's [BoneMap] editor. For example, [SkeletonProfileHumanoid] has 4 groups. This property exists to separate the bone list into several sections in the editor.

members.name: RootBone
members.summary: A bone name that will be used as the root bone in [AnimationTree]. This should be the bone of the parent of hips that exists at the world origin.

members.name: ScaleBaseBone
members.summary: A bone name which will use model's height as the coefficient for normalization. For example, [SkeletonProfileHumanoid] defines it as [code]Hips[/code].

signals.name: ProfileUpdated
signals.summary: This signal is emitted when change the value in profile. This is used to update key name in the [BoneMap] and to redraw the [BoneMap] editor. [b]Note:[/b] This signal is not connected directly to editor to simplify the reference, instead it is passed on to editor through the [BoneMap].

values.name: TAIL_DIRECTION_AVERAGE_CHILDREN
values.summary: Direction to the average coordinates of bone children.

values.name: TAIL_DIRECTION_SPECIFIC_CHILD
values.summary: Direction to the coordinates of specified bone child.

constants.name: TAIL_DIRECTION_AVERAGE_CHILDREN
constants.summary: Direction to the average coordinates of bone children.

constants.name: TAIL_DIRECTION_SPECIFIC_CHILD
constants.summary: Direction to the coordinates of specified bone child.
